case_title: JOSE MARTINEZ VS. LUIS DARIO SARAT

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-14-2017 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARTINEZ, JOSE DBA MEX EXPRESS, INC. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SARAT, LUIS DARIO DBA CALIFORNIA AUTO GLASS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-14-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-14-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,894.75 FILED BY MARTINEZ, JOSE DBA MEX EXPRESS, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT SARAT, LUIS DARIO DBA CALIFORNIA AUTO GLASS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-14-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$0);SEE PROOF OF SERVICE AS TO DATE OF MAILING AND PERSON SERVED SERVED JUN-27-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SARAT, LUIS DARIO DBA CALIFORNIA AUTO GLASS
